news.title: Fed nominee Warsh filings detail vast wealth, far exceeding past chairs

news.title: Wholesale prices rose 0.5% in March, much less than expected despite war impact

news.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent now says it's OK for the Fed to wait to lower rates amid oil surge
news.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.

news.title: Global oil demand plummets by most since pandemic, says IEA
news.summary: Demand drops 3.4% in March due to soaring prices, supply shortages and collapse of Middle East air travel
